# Mine And Yours Cleaning Inc.

> Commercial and janitorial cleaning company serving Sarnia and Lambton County, Ontario. Provides customized, recurring cleaning programs for offices, public-sector facilities, community organizations, property managers, and retail businesses, along with deep cleaning, post-construction cleaning, and selected residential cleaning. Founded in 2015 and locally owned and operated.

## Services

- [Commercial Cleaning](https://mineandyourscleaning.ca/commercial-cleaning.html): Recurring commercial cleaning programs for offices, public facilities, and organizations.
- [Janitorial Services](https://mineandyourscleaning.ca/janitorial-services.html): Ongoing, scheduled maintenance visits that keep floors, washrooms, and common areas consistently maintained.
- [Office Cleaning](https://mineandyourscleaning.ca/office-cleaning.html): Office cleaning scaled to headcount and traffic, from small independent offices to larger administrative buildings.
- [Public Facility Cleaning](https://mineandyourscleaning.ca/public-facility-cleaning.html): Cleaning support for municipal and community-serving buildings that see continuous public and staff traffic.
- [Property Management Cleaning](https://mineandyourscleaning.ca/property-management-cleaning.html): Common-area maintenance, unit turnovers, and real estate turnovers for property managers and multi-site organizations.
- [Deep Cleaning](https://mineandyourscleaning.ca/deep-cleaning.html): A more thorough, periodic service that resets a space before or between recurring cleaning visits.
- [Post-Construction Cleaning](https://mineandyourscleaning.ca/post-construction-cleaning.html): One-time cleanup that prepares a renovated or newly built space for occupancy.
- [Selected Residential Cleaning](https://mineandyourscleaning.ca/residential-cleaning.html): Reliable cleaning support for select private homes, offered alongside the primary commercial focus.

## Company

- [About Us](https://mineandyourscleaning.ca/about.html): Company history, mission, values, and leadership.
- [Industries We Serve](https://mineandyourscleaning.ca/industries.html): Public-sector facilities, community organizations, commercial offices, property managers, retail, recreational facilities, places of worship, and selected residential clients.
- [Our Process](https://mineandyourscleaning.ca/process.html): How a customized cleaning program is built, from consultation through service delivery.
- [FAQ](https://mineandyourscleaning.ca/faq.html): Answers to common questions about services, scheduling, pricing process, and policies.
- [Service Area](https://mineandyourscleaning.ca/service-area.html): Communities served throughout Sarnia and Lambton County.
- [Careers](https://mineandyourscleaning.ca/careers.html): Employment opportunities.
- [Partnerships](https://mineandyourscleaning.ca/partnerships.html): Vendor, subcontractor, and referral partnership opportunities.
- [Contact](https://mineandyourscleaning.ca/contact.html): Start a service inquiry or ask a general question.

## Notes

- This company does not publish pricing publicly; quotes are provided after a free consultation and site assessment.
- Service area is limited to Sarnia and Lambton County, Ontario, and nearby communities.
